text: Blessed is He who sent down the Criterion upon His Servant that he may be to the worlds a warner -
tl: Tabaarakal lazee nazzalal Furqaana 'alaa 'abdihee li-yakoona lil'aalameena nazeera

text: He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and who has not taken a son and has not had a partner in dominion and has created each thing and determined it with [precise] determination.
tl: Allazee lahoo mulkus samaawaati wal ardi Wa-lam yattakhiz waladanw Wa-lam yakul lahoo shareekun filmulki Wa-khalaqa kulla shai'in faqaddarahoo taqdeeraa

text: But they have taken besides Him gods which create nothing, while they are created, and possess not for themselves any harm or benefit and possess not [power to cause] death or life or resurrection.
tl: Wattakhazoo min dooniheee aalihatal laa yakhluqoona shai'anw Wa-hum yukhlaqoona Wa-laa yamlikoona li-anfusihim darranw Wa-laa naf'anw Wa-laa yamlikoona mawtanw Wa-laa hayaatanw Wa-laa nushooraa

text: And those who disbelieve say, \"This [Qur’ān] is not except a falsehood he invented, and another people assisted him in it.\" But they have committed an injustice and a lie.
tl: Wa-qaalal lazeena kafarooo in haazaaa illaaa ifkunif taraahu Wa-a'aanahoo 'alaihi qawmun aakharoona faqad jaaa'oo zulmanw Wa-zooraa

text: And they say, \"Legends of the former peoples which he has written down, and they are dictated to him morning and afternoon.\"
tl: Wa-qaalooo asaateerul awwaleenak tatabahaa fahiya tumlaa 'alaihi bukratanw Wa-aseelaa

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"It has been revealed by He who knows [every] secret within the heavens and the earth. Indeed, He is ever Forgiving and Merciful.\"
tl: Qul anzalhul lazee ya'lamus sirra fis samaawaati wal-ard; innahoo kaana Ghafoorar Raheemaa

text: And they say, \"What is this messenger that eats food and walks in the markets? Why was there not sent down to him an angel so he would be with him a warner?
tl: Wa-qaaloo maa-li haazar Rasooli ya'kulut ta'aama Wa-yamshee fil aswaaq; law-laaa unzila ilaihi malakun fa-yakoona ma'ahoo nazeeraa

text: Or [why is not] a treasure presented to him [from heaven], or does he [not] have a garden from which he eats?\" And the wrongdoers say, \"You follow not but a man affected by magic.\"
tl: Aw yulqaaa ilaihi kanzun aw takoonu lahoo jannatuien ya'kulu minhaa; Wa-qaalaz zaalimoona in tattabi'oona illaa rajulan mas-hooraa

text: Look how they strike for you comparisons; but they have strayed, so they cannot [find] a way.
tl: Unzur kaifa daraboo lakal amsaala fadalloo falaa yastatee'oona sabeelaa

text: Blessed is He who, if He willed, could have made for you [something] better than that - gardens beneath which rivers flow - and could make for you palaces.
tl: Tabaarakal lazeee in shaaa'a ja'ala laka khairan min zaalika jannaatin tajree min tahtihal anhaaru Wa-yaj'al laka qusooraa

text: But they have denied the Hour, and We have prepared for those who deny the Hour a Blaze.
tl: Bal kazzaboo bis-Saa'ati Wa-a'tadnaa liman kazzaba bis-Saa'ati sa'eeraa

text: When it [i.e., the Hellfire] sees them from a distant place, they will hear its fury and roaring.
tl: Izaa ra'at-hum min makaanin ba'eedin sami'oo lahaa taghaiyuzanw Wa-zafeeraa

text: And when they are thrown into a narrow place therein bound in chains, they will cry out thereupon for destruction.
tl: Wa-izaaa ulqoo minhaa makaanan daiyyiqam muqar-raneena da'aw hunaalika thuboora

text: [They will be told], \"Do not cry this Day for one destruction but cry for much destruction.\"
tl: Laa tad'ul yawma thubooranw waahidanw wad'oo thubooran kaseeraa

text: Say, \"Is that better or the Garden of Eternity which is promised to the righteous? It will be for them a reward and destination.
tl: Qul azaalika khairun am Jannatul khuldil latee wu'idal muttaqoon; kaanat lahum jazaaa'anw Wa-maseeraa

text: For them therein is whatever they wish, [while] abiding eternally. It is ever upon your Lord a promise [worthy to be] requested.
tl: Lahum feehaa maa yashaaa'oona khaalideen; kaana 'alaa Rabbika wa'dan mas'oolaa

text: And [mention] the Day He will gather them and that which they worship besides Allāh and will say, \"Did you mislead these, My servants, or did they [themselves] stray from the way?\"
tl: Wa-Yawma yahshuruhum Wa-maa ya'budoona min doonil laahi fa-yaqoolu 'a-antum adlaltum 'ibaadee haaa'ulaaa'i am hum dallus sabeel

text: They will say, \"Exalted are You! It was not for us to take besides You any allies [i.e., protectors]. But You provided comforts for them and their fathers until they forgot the message and became a people ruined.\"
tl: Qaaloo Subhaanaka maa kaana yanbaghee lanaaa an nattakhiza min doonika min awliyaaa'a Wa-laakin matta'tahum Wa-aabaaa'ahum hattaa nasooz zikra Wa-kaanoo qawman booraa

text: So they will deny you, [disbelievers], in what you say, and you cannot avert [punishment] or [find] help. And whoever commits injustice among you - We will make him taste a great punishment.
tl: Faqad kazzabookum bimaa taqooloona famaa tastatee'oona sarfanw Wa-laa nasraa; Wa-many yazlim minkum nuziqhu 'azaaban kabeeraa

text: And We did not send before you, [O Muḥammad], any of the messengers except that they ate food and walked in the markets. And We have made some of you [people] as trial for others - will you have patience? And ever is your Lord, Seeing.
tl: Wa-maaa arsalnaa qablaka minal mursaleena illaaa innahum la-ya'kuloonat ta'aama Wa-yamshoona fil aswaaq; Wa-ja'alnaa ba'dakum liba'din fitnatan atasbiroon; Wa-kaana Rabbuka Baseera

text: And those who do not expect the meeting with Us say, \"Why were not angels sent down to us, or [why] do we [not] see our Lord?\" They have certainly become arrogant within themselves and [become] insolent with great insolence.
tl: Wa-qaalal lazeena laa yarjoona liqaaa'anaa law-laaa unzila 'alainal malaaa'ikatu aw naraa Rabbanaa; laqadis takbaroo feee anfusihim Wa-'ataw 'utuwwan kabeeraa

text: The day they see the angels - no good tidings will there be that day for the criminals, and [the angels] will say, \"Prevented and inaccessible.\"
tl: Yawma yarawnal malaaa-'ikata laa bushraa Yawmaizin lil-mujrimeena Wa-yaqooloona hijran mahjooraa

text: And We will approach [i.e., regard] what they have done of deeds and make them as dust dispersed.
tl: Wa qadimnaaa ilaa maa 'amiloo min 'amalin faja'alnaahuhabaaa'an manthooraa

text: The companions of Paradise, that Day, are [in] a better settlement and better resting place.
tl: As-haabul jannati yawma'izin khairun mustaqar-ranw Wa-ahsanu maqeela

text: And [mention] the Day when the heaven will split open with [emerging] clouds, and the angels will be sent down in successive descent.
tl: Wa-Yawma tashaqqaqus samaaa'u bilghamaami Wa-nuzzilal malaaa'ikatu tanzeela

text: True sovereignty, that Day, is for the Most Merciful. And it will be upon the disbelievers a difficult Day.
tl: Almulku Yawma'izinil haqqu lir Rahmaan; Wa-kaana Yawman'alal kaafireena 'aseeraa

text: And the Day the wrongdoer will bite on his hands [in regret] he will say, \"Oh, I wish I had taken with the Messenger a way.
tl: Wa-Yawma ya'adduz zaalimu 'alaa yadaihi yaqoolu yaa-laitanit takhaztu ma'ar Rasooli sabeelaa

text: Oh, woe to me! I wish I had not taken that one as a friend.
tl: Yaa-wailataa laitanee lam attakhiz fulaanan khaleelaa

text: He led me away from the remembrance after it had come to me. And ever is Satan, to man, a deserter.\"
tl: Laqad adallanee 'aniz zikri ba'da iz jaaa'anee; Wa-kaanash Shaitaanu lil-insaani khazoolaa

text: And the Messenger has said, \"O my Lord, indeed my people have taken this Qur’ān as [a thing] abandoned.\"
tl: Wa-qaalar Rasoolu yaa-Rabbi inna qawmit takhazoo haazal Qur'aana mahjooraa

text: And thus have We made for every prophet an enemy from among the criminals. But sufficient is your Lord as a guide and a helper.
tl: Wa-kazaalika ja'alnaa likulli Nabiyyin 'aduwwan minal mujrimeen; Wa-kafaa bi-Rabbika haadiyanw Wa-naseeraa

text: And those who disbelieve say, \"Why was the Qur’ān not revealed to him all at once?\" Thus [it is] that We may strengthen thereby your heart. And We have spaced it distinctly.
tl: Wa-qaalal lazeena kafaroo law-laa nuzzila 'alaihil Qur'aanu jumlatanw waahidah; kazaalika linusabbita bihee fu'aadaka Wa-rattalnaahu tarteelaa

text: And they do not come to you with an example [i.e., argument] except that We bring you the truth and the best explanation.
tl: Wa-laa ya'toonaka bi-masalin illaa ji'naaka bilhaqqi Wa-ahsana tafseeraa

text: The ones who are gathered on their faces to Hell - those are the worst in position and farthest astray in [their] way.
tl: Allazeena yuhsharoona 'alaa wujoohihim ilaa jahannama ulaaa'ika sharrun makaananw Wa-adallu sabeelaa

text: And We had certainly given Moses the Scripture and appointed with him his brother Aaron as an assistant.
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaa Moosal Kitaaba Wa-ja'alnaa ma'ahooo akhaahu Haaroona wazeeraa

text: And We said, \"Go both of you to the people who have denied Our signs.\" Then We destroyed them with [complete] destruction.
tl: Faqulnaz habaaa ilal qawmil lazeena kazzaboo bi-Aayaatinaa fadammarnaahum tadmeeraa

text: And the people of Noah - when they denied the messengers, We drowned them, and We made them for mankind a sign. And We have prepared for the wrongdoers a painful punishment.
tl: Wa-qawma Noohin lammaa kazzabur Rusula aghraqnaahum Wa-ja'alnaahum linnaasi Aayatanw Wa-a'tadnaa lizzaalimeena 'azaaban aleemaa

text: And [We destroyed] ʿAad and Thamūd and the companions of the well and many generations between them.
tl: Wa-'Aadanw Wa-Samooda Wa-As-haabar Rassi Wa-quroonan baina zaalika katheeraa

text: And for each We presented examples [as warnings], and each We destroyed with [total] destruction.
tl: Wa-kullan darabnaa lahul amsaala Wa-kullan tabbarnaa tatbeera

text: And they have already come upon the town which was showered with a rain of evil [i.e., stones]. So have they not seen it? But they are not expecting resurrection.
tl: Wa-laqad ataw 'alal qaryatil lateee umtirat mataras saw'; afalam yakoonoo yarawnahaa; bal kaanoo laa yarjoona nushooraa

text: And when they see you, [O Muḥammad], they take you not except in ridicule, [saying], \"Is this the one whom Allāh has sent as a messenger?
tl: Wa-izaa ra-awka ien yattakhizoonaka illaa huzuwan ahaazal lazee ba'asal laahu Rasoolaa

text: He almost would have misled us from our gods had we not been steadfast in [worship of] them.\" But they are going to know, when they see the punishment, who is farthest astray in [his] way.
tl: In kaada la-yudillunaa 'an aalihatinaa law-laaa an sabarnaa 'alaihaa; Wa-sawfa ya'lamoona heena yarawnal 'azaaba man adallu sabeela

text: Have you seen the one who takes as his god his own desire? Then would you be responsible for him?
tl: Ara'aita manit takhaza ilaahahoo hawaahu afa-anta takoonu 'alaihi wakeelaa

text: Or do you think that most of them hear or reason? They are not except like livestock. Rather, they are [even] more astray in [their] way.
tl: Am tahsabu anna aksarahum yasma'oona aw ya'qiloon; in hum illaa kal-an'aami bal hum adallu sabeelaa

text: Have you not considered your Lord - how He extends the shadow, and if He willed, He could have made it stationary? Then We made the sun for it an indication.
tl: Alam tara ilaa Rabbika kaifa maddaz zilla Wa-law shaaa'a la-ja'alahoo saakinan thumma ja'alnash shamsa 'alaihi daleelaa

text: Then We [retract and] hold it with Us for a brief grasp.
tl: Thumma qabadnaahu ilainaa qabdany yaseeraa

text: And it is He who has made the night for you as clothing and sleep [a means for] rest and has made the day a resurrection.
tl: Wa-Huwal lazee ja'ala lakumul laila libaasanw wannawma subaatanw Wa-ja'alan nahaara nushooraa

text: And it is He who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy [i.e., rainfall], and We send down from the sky pure water
tl: Wa-Huwal lazeee arsalar riyaaha bushran baina yadai rahmatih; Wa-anzalnaa minas samaaa'i maaa'an tahooraa

text: That We may bring to life thereby a dead land and give it as drink to those We created of numerous livestock and men.
tl: Linuhyiya bihee baldatan maitanw-wa nusqiyahoo mimmaa khalaqnaaa an'aamanw Wa-anaasiyya katheeraa

text: And We have certainly distributed it among them that they might be reminded, but most of the people refuse except disbelief.
tl: Wa-laqad sarrafnaahu bainahum li-yazzakkaroo fa-abaaa aksarun naasi illaa kufooraa

text: And if We had willed, We could have sent into every city a warner.
tl: Wa-law shi'naa laba'asnaa fee kulli qaryatin nazeeraa

text: So do not obey the disbelievers, and strive against them with it [i.e., the Qur’ān] a great striving.
tl: Falaa tuti'il kaafireena Wa-jaahidhum bihee jihaadan kabeeraa

text: And it is He who has released [simultaneously] the two seas [i.e., bodies of water], one fresh and sweet and one salty and bitter, and He placed between them a barrier and prohibiting partition.
tl: Wa-Huwal lazee marajal bahraini haazaa 'azbun furaatunw Wa-haazaa milhun ujaaj; Wa-ja'ala bainahumaa barzakhanw Wa-hijran mahjooraa

text: And it is He who has created from water [i.e., semen] a human being and made him [a relative by] lineage and marriage. And ever is your Lord competent [concerning creation].
tl: Wa-Huwal lazee khalaqa minal maaa'i basharan fa-ja'alahoo nasaban Wa-sihraa; Wa-kaana Rabbuka Qadeeraa

text: But they worship rather than Allāh that which does not benefit them or harm them, and the disbeliever is ever, against his Lord, an assistant [to Satan].
tl: Wa-ya'budoona min doonil laahi maa laa yanfa'uhum Wa-laa yadurruhum; Wa-kaanal kaafiru 'alaa Rabbihee zaheeraa

text: And We have not sent you, [O Muḥammad], except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner.
tl: Wa-maa arsalnaaka illaa mubashshiranw Wa-nazeeraa

text: Say, \"I do not ask of you for it any payment - only that whoever wills might take to his Lord a way.\"
tl: Qul maaa as'alukum 'alaihi min ajrin illaa man shaaa'a ai yattakhiza ilaa Rabbihee sabeelaa

text: And rely upon the Ever-Living who does not die, and exalt [Allāh] with His praise. And sufficient is He to be, with the sins of His servants, [fully] Aware -
tl: Wa-tawakkal 'alal Haiyil lazee laa yamootu Wa-sabbih bihamdih; Wa-kafaa bihee bizunoobi 'ibaadihee khabeeraa

text: He who created the heavens and the earth and what is between them in six days and then established Himself above the Throne - the Most Merciful, so ask about Him one well informed [i.e., the Prophet (ﷺ)].
tl: Allazee khalaqas samaawaati wal-arda Wa-maa bainahumaa fee sittati aiyaamin thumma stawaa 'alal 'Arsh; ar-Rahmaanu fas'al bihee khabeeraa

text: And when it is said to them, \"Prostrate to the Most Merciful,\" they say, \"And what is the Most Merciful? Should we prostrate to that which you order us?\" And it increases them in aversion.
tl: Wa-izaa qeela lahumus judoo lir-Rahmaani qaaloo Wa-mar Rahmaanu 'a-nasjudu limaa ta'murunaa Wa-zaadahum nufooraa

text: Blessed is He who has placed in the sky great stars and placed therein a [burning] lamp and luminous moon.
tl: Tabaarakal lazee ja'ala fis samaaa'i buroojanw Wa-ja'ala feehaa siraajanw Wa-qamaran muneeraa

text: And it is He who has made the night and the day in succession for whoever desires to remember or desires gratitude.
tl: Wa-huwal lazee ja'alal laila wannahaara khilfatan liman araada 'any yazzakkara aw araadaa shukooraa

text: And the servants of the Most Merciful are those who walk upon the earth easily, and when the ignorant address them [harshly], they say [words of] peace,
tl: Wa-'ibaadur Rahmaanil lazeena yamshoona 'alal ardi hawnanw Wa-izaa khaata-bahumul jaahiloona qaaloo salaamaa

text: And those who spend [part of] the night to their Lord prostrating and standing [in prayer]
tl: Wallazeena yabeetoona li-Rabbihim sujjadanw Wa-qiyaamaa

text: And those who say, \"Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell. Indeed, its punishment is ever adhering;
tl: Wallazeena yaqooloona Rabbanas rif 'annaa 'azaaba Jahannama inna 'azaabahaa kaana gharaamaa

text: Indeed, it is evil as a settlement and residence.\"
tl: Innahaa saaa'at mustaqarranw Wa-muqaamaa

text: And [they are] those who, when they spend, do so not excessively or sparingly but are ever, between that, [justly] moderate
tl: Wallazeena izaaa anfaqoo lam yusrifoo Wa-lam yaqturoo Wa-kaana baina zaalika qawaamaa

text: And those who do not invoke with Allāh another deity or kill the soul which Allāh has forbidden [to be killed], except by right, and do not commit unlawful sexual intercourse. And whoever should do that will meet a penalty.
tl: Wallazeena laa yad'oona ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara Wa-laa yaqtuloonan nafsal latee harramal laahu illaa bilhaqqi Wa-laa yaznoon; Wa-mai yaf'al zaalika yalqa 'athaamaa

text: Multiplied for him is the punishment on the Day of Resurrection, and he will abide therein humiliated -
tl: Yudaa'af lahul 'azaabu Yawmal Qiyaamati Wa-yakhlud feehee muhaanaa

text: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allāh will replace their evil deeds with good. And ever is Allāh Forgiving and Merciful.
tl: Illaa man taaba Wa-'aamana Wa-'amila 'amalan saalihan fa-ulaaa'ika yubad-dilul laahu saiyyi-aatihim hasanaat; Wa-kaanal laahu Ghafoorar Raheemaa

text: And he who repents and does righteousness does indeed turn to Allāh with [accepted] repentance.
tl: Wa-man taaba Wa-'amila saalihan fa-innahoo yatoobu ilal laahi mataabaa

text: And [they are] those who do not testify to falsehood, and when they pass near ill speech, they pass by with dignity.
tl: Wallazeena laa yash-hadoonaz zoora Wa-izaa marroo billaghwi marroo kiraamaa

text: And those who, when reminded of the verses of their Lord, do not fall upon them deaf and blind.
tl: Wallazeena izaa zukkiroo bi-Aayaati Rabbihim lam yakhirroo 'alaihaa summanw wa'umyaanaa

text: And those who say, \"Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us a leader [i.e., example] for the righteous.\"
tl: Wallazeena yaqooloona Rabbanaa hab lanaa min azwaajinaa Wa-zurriyaatinaa qurrata a'yuninw waj-'alnaa lilmuttaqeena Imaamaa

text: Those will be awarded the Chamber for what they patiently endured, and they will be received therein with greetings and [words of] peace,
tl: Ulaaa'ika yujzawnal ghurfata bimaa sabaroo Wa-yulaqqawna feehaa tahiyyatanw Wa-salaamaa

text: Abiding eternally therein. Good is the settlement and residence.
tl: Khaalideena feehaa; hasunat mustaqarranw Wa-muqaamaa

text: Say, \"What would my Lord care for you if not for your supplication?\" For you [disbelievers] have denied, so it [i.e., your denial] is going to be adherent.
tl: Qul maa ya'ba'u bikum Rabbee law-laa du'aaa'ukum faqad kazzabtum fasawfa yakoonu lizaamaa
